PowerShell($env:NODE_PATH = "C:\\Users\\a.polizzi\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\node_modules"; node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('C:/Users/a.polizzi/Desktop/App/Vyro/CHECKLIST.xlsx'\); const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws, {header:1, defval:''}\); data.slice\(142\).forEach\(\(row,i\) => console.log\(i+142, JSON.stringify\(row\)\)\); console.log\('\\n=== Sheet 2 ==='\); const ws2 = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[1]]; const data2 = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws2, {header:1, defval:''}\); data2.forEach\(\(row,i\) => console.log\(i, JSON.stringify\(row\)\)\);")
